code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Security_Encryption] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Security_Encryption) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Security_OAuth2) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Security_IntrusionDetection) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Security_Encryption) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Security_Firewall) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Security_OAuth2) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Security_ZeroTrust) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Security_Firewall) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为外部服务调用设计一个熔断器模式。核心场景是webhook投递，当下游故障时能快速失败，避免级联雪崩。整个机制围绕三个状态运转：Closed正常放行、Open熔断阻断、HalfOpen试探恢复。
明白，三个核心状态。我注意到状态转换需要绑定安全组件来触发，比如用Security_Encryption做初始状态锚点，Security_OAuth2处理成功回调，Security_Firewall做访问控制。这样设计可以吗？
对，Security_Encryption作为信任根很关键。Closed状态下所有请求正常通过，但要监控失败率，一旦达到阈值就切换到Open。Open状态要完全阻断，直接返回错误或缓存响应，同时记录所有被拦截的请求。
好的，我先把Closed和Open画出来。Closed到Open的转换条件是Failure Threshold Exceeded，由Security_Encryption触发。Open状态内部我加上注释说明：阻断所有请求、返回缓存或错误、等待超时、记录日志。
Open状态超时后进入HalfOpen，这时候只放有限的测试请求过去，Security_ZeroTrust负责判定测试失败的情况，一旦失败立刻回退到Open。测试成功则由Security_OAuth2确认，恢复为Closed。
HalfOpen还有个自循环状态Waiting for Test，由Security_Firewall触发，我理解是保持有限吞吐量等待探针结果。另外Closed内部也有自循环：成功请求走OAuth2，失败请求走IntrusionDetection，这样对吗？
没错。HalfOpen的核心是quick transition decision，不能久拖不决。三个状态的注释都要完整：Closed强调monitor failure rate和increment error counter；Open强调wait for timeout period；HalfOpen强调limited throughput和monitor success rate。
完成。三个状态注释已补全，所有转换边都绑定了对应的安全组件。Security_IntrusionDetection处理Closed内的失败计数，Security_Firewall控制Open和HalfOpen的流量闸门，Security_ZeroTrust做熔断后的快速失败判定。
